message:
fix(robot): address bugs in CASS context injection

Bug fixes found during code review:

1. formatStructured: Apply cleanContentForMarkdown() to limit content
   length consistently with formatMarkdown (prevents excessive output)

2. formatMinimal: Add "// ---" separators between items to enable
   accurate counting in countInjectedItems

3. countInjectedItems: For FormatMinimal, count actual items using
   separator markers instead of always returning 0 or 1

4. extractSessionName: Fix dead code (len(parts)==0 check never true)
   and handle empty path/filename edge cases explicitly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
